name: Razorpay Payment Service — Pool Tuning & Query Optimization
scenario: Razorpay's payment service hits connection pool exhaustion during payment spikes, and the merchant dashboard query takes 8 seconds. Diagnose both issues, configure HikariCP correctly, add targeted indexes via Flyway migration, and add monitoring.
description: HikariCP configuration for 8-core server + 3 Flyway index migrations + EXPLAIN ANALYZE analysis (documented) + Actuator pool monitoring + @DataJpaTest verifying queries return correct results.

core.description: application-prod.properties: HikariCP with maximum-pool-size=17 (8-core SSD formula), minimum-idle=4, connection-timeout=2000, max-lifetime=1200000, leak-detection-threshold=5000, pool-name='Razorpay-Payments-Pool'.

V5__add_payment_indexes.sql: 3 indexes using CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY: (1) composite (merchant_id, status) with INCLUDE(total,created_at), (2) partial (merchant_id) WHERE status='AUTHORIZED', (3) (created_at DESC) for time-range queries.
EXPLAIN_ANALYSIS.md in project: documents before (Seq Scan, ~9000ms) and after (Index Scan, ~0.4ms) for the merchant dashboard query. Explains why each index was chosen.
PaymentRepository: 3 query methods with derived queries or @Query that use the indexes: findByMerchantIdAndStatus, findByMerchantIdAndStatusOrderByCreatedAtDesc (paginated), findByCreatedAtBetween.
PoolHealthMonitor @Service with @Scheduled: logs pool stats every 30s, logs CRITICAL if pending > 3, logs WARN if active/total > 0.85.

@DataJpaTest (4 tests): findByMerchantIdAndStatus returns correct count, findByCreatedAtBetween returns correct range, duplicate merchant doesn't cause errors, total sum correct for merchant. All 4 pass.

bonus.description: Programmatic HikariDataSource @Bean with @ConfigurationProperties AppDataSourceProperties POJO. Validates max-lifetime < 1800000 (30min DB timeout). Registers metrics via HikariDataSourceMetrics.
Add a read replica datasource ('ReplicaPool'): separate @Bean("replicaDataSource") with pool-size=30, readOnly=true. PaymentReportService that injects the replica DataSource for analytics queries.

Add P6Spy slow query logging: p6spy-spring-boot-starter dependency, jdbc:p6spy:postgresql URL, slow-query-threshold=100ms. Demonstrate that a findAll() without a WHERE clause triggers a slow-query log entry.

data_to_use:
Payments seed data for @DataJpaTest:
  M001: 3 AUTHORIZED payments (₹1000, ₹2500, ₹800)
  M001: 2 CAPTURED payments (₹3000, ₹1500)
  M002: 1 AUTHORIZED payment (₹500)
  Date range: 2024-01 to 2024-03

Expected query results:
  findByMerchantIdAndStatus(M001, AUTHORIZED) → 3
  findByCreatedAtBetween(Jan, Mar) → depends on seed dates
  sum(total) for M001 = 1000+2500+800+3000+1500 = 8800
example_output:
# Pool startup log:
[Hikari] Razorpay-Payments-Pool - Starting...
[Hikari] Razorpay-Payments-Pool - pool size is 17; idle connections is 4

# Normal load:
[Pool] total=17 active=4 idle=13 pending=0 — HEALTHY

# Spike:
[CRITICAL] Pool exhausted! pending=8 active=17/17 — INCREASE POOL OR FIX SLOW QUERIES

# Leak detected:
[WARN] Apparent connection leak detected:
  at com.razorpay.PaymentService.processPayment(:142)

# Tests:
✓ findByMerchantAndStatus_returns3
✓ findByDateRange_returnsCorrect
✓ totalSum_correct
✓ multiMerchantIsolation
ai_policy_explanation: Limited to 5 hints. CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY cannot be inside a transaction; add spring.flyway.mixed=true or use -- flyway:executeInTransaction=false comment at top of migration. INCLUDE columns: INCLUDE(total, created_at) — not part of index key, but included in leaf pages. Partial index WHERE status='AUTHORIZED': only indexes authorized payments. Pool size formula: (8 × 2) + 1 = 17. Actuator: management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=health,metrics,prometheus.
submission_instructions: GitHub push. All 4 @DataJpaTest tests pass. EXPLAIN_ANALYSIS.md included in src/main/resources/docs/. README explains the pool sizing rationale.
tips_for_success: Flyway + CONCURRENTLY: add 'spring.flyway.mixed=true' to properties or file comment -- flyway:executeInTransaction=false
Test properties: src/test/resources/application.properties must disable Flyway
Partial index: CREATE INDEX idx ON payments(merchant_id) WHERE status='AUTHORIZED' — only indexes that subset
INCLUDE for covering index: INCLUDE(total, created_at) avoids heap fetch for those columns
Pool formula: 8-core SSD = (8×2)+1 = 17 — document this in your README
concepts_reinforced: HikariCP production configuration with all key properties
Composite index with INCLUDE for covering queries
Partial index for selective access patterns
